Uses of Interface
recoder.convenience.ProgramElementWalker

Packages that use ProgramElementWalker
Package
Description
recoder.convenience
The convenience layer contains auxiliary functions that are useful in the context of RECODER.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.

  • Uses of ProgramElementWalker in recoder.convenience

    Classes in recoder.convenience that implement ProgramElementWalker
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractTreeWalker
    Walks a syntax tree in iterator-like fashion.
    class 
    CustomTreeWalker
    A tree walker that allows to customize the traversal.
    class 
    ForestWalker
    Walks all syntax trees from a list of compilation units in depth-first order.
    class 
    TreeWalker
    Walks a syntax tree in depth-first order.

  • Uses of ProgramElementWalker in recoder.kit

    Classes in recoder.kit that implement ProgramElementWalker
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    StatementKit.ControlFlowWalker
    This walker performs a depth first search and reports the reachable statements in the body of the given member.
